side_effects.description: Stomach injections hurt more than thigh injections. Shallow pinch closer to injection site reduces needle sensation.

protocol_notes: First GHK-Cu shot on underside of thigh was easier than expected, no burn. Previous peptides injected on each side of stomach. Plans to use pen for glute injections. Injection technique: shallow pinch close to injection site reduces sensation; large stomach pinch increases sensation.
